description_long: This humanoid robot features a robust, glossy black and gray body with a rounded torso and prominent, articulated limbs. Its head is cylindrical with two blue antenna-like protrusions on either side and a faceplate that includes two circular blue eyes, giving it a friendly, expressive appearance. The arms are thick and jointed, ending in mechanical hands with three fingers and a thumb, each finger segmented for dexterity. The legs are similarly jointed and end in large, rounded feet, suggesting stability and mobility. The back of the torso has a central circular detail, possibly a port or access panel, and the overall design is sleek with a combination of hard, smooth surfaces and metallic highlights. The robot's posture and raised hand suggest it is capable of gesturing and interacting with its environment.
description: A glossy black and gray humanoid robot with a rounded torso, expressive blue eyes, articulated limbs, and mechanical hands, designed for urban interaction.
description_view_0: Front view showing the robot's face with blue eyes, raised left hand in a gesture, and full frontal detail of the torso and limbs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cylindrical head, arm articulation, and the depth of the torso and limbs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back panel, both arms, and the structure of the legs and feet.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the head profile, arm joints, and the curvature of the back and legs.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with both legs straight, left arm raised and hand open in a gesture, right arm relaxed at the side, head facing forward.
attribute_clothing_style: Unclothed; exterior consists of integrated glossy panels and metallic components with no visible clothing or decorative coverings.
attribute_facial_features: Faceplate with two large, circular blue eyes, no visible mouth or nose, and two blue antenna-like protrusions on either side of the head; expression is neutral and friendly.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs have multiple visible joints, including shoulder, elbow, wrist, hip, knee, and ankle; hands have articulated fingers with three segments each, allowing for a wide range of motion.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Visible sensors include two blue optical sensors (eyes) on the faceplate; possible additional sensors in the head and back panel, but none explicitly visible beyond the eyes.
